title: vvp: Handle null-bytes in a conistent way when reading through VPI

features.name: ternary operator with string literals and $display
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator with string literal branches used with $display %s format, where the false branch is selected by a constant condition

features.name: empty string as 8'h00 equivalent in display
features.description: Code should include an empty string literal passed to $display with %s format specifier, demonstrating LRM requirement that empty string equals 8'h00

features.name: conditional expression with zero-padded string literals
features.description: Code should include a conditional expression (ternary) with zero-padded string literals where context removal by optimization affects string representation
